items.title: Solana Ventures leads $18 million round in Squads to scale its stablecoin platform Altitude
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana Ventures' investment in Squads enhances the ecosystem's stablecoin capabilities, potentially increasing liquidity and usage within the Solana network.

items.title: GSR says Crypto Core3 ETF is simple gateway for mainstream investors
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of the Crypto Core3 ETF could attract mainstream investors to crypto, indirectly benefiting Solana's market position as adoption grows.

items.title: Meta begins offering USDC creator payouts to crypto wallets on Solana and Polygon blockchains
items.whyYouShouldCare: Meta's USDC payouts to Solana wallets could drive more user engagement and transactions on the network, boosting overall ecosystem activity.
